description: Permit the JS frontend to invoke the app's own `open_external` Rust command. Tauri 2.x's ACL denies custom commands by default — even ones registered in the same crate — so the capability needs to reference this permission explicitly. Without it the bridge logs 'Command open_external not allowed by ACL' and falls back to the shell plugin, which in turn fails its scope check and breaks every link click in the app.
